official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the add_entity packet id.

official_sources.function_or_member: net.minecraft.network.protocol.game.ClientboundAddEntityPacket(int, UUID, double, double, double, float, float, EntityType<?>, int, Vec3, double)
official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing a minimal add_entity packet without an initialized Entity or ServerEntity.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound add_entity frame with bootstrapped built-in registries.
Official binary source for the fixture entity type registry id and zero movement body bytes.

field_notes.fixture: Uses the official value constructor, bootstrapped built-in EntityType.PIG, and Vec3.ZERO so the official add_entity codec can encode/decode without initialized world, Entity, or ServerEntity state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound add_entity packet framing and dispatch/decode for one direct official constructor fixture with built-in EntityType.PIG and zero movement only; do not infer arbitrary entity registry contents, initialized Entity/ServerEntity behavior, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
